review_text: I phoned this company in Memorial Day to ask them to please put a stop work order on the employees working on a home next to me, the loud construction work was disrespectful to our enjoyment of a peaceful holiday. An answering service kindly told me they are observing the holiday and cannot take calls. Profit matters .. no respect or principals for anyone else.
They did a great job! They were very professional and responsive. We would hire them again.
It went very well. They did a good job. Highly recommend.
Great - on time - didn't even have to be home. All work performed and everything cleaned up. Extremely pleased and happy with the price.

He does gutter repair and installation. He was one of the honest gutter people that I have had. He gave me several different run downs of options. He told me what work best for my house and what would would not. He has plans where you can sign up that he will come out automatically two or three times a year to take care of the gutters which I have never had anyone do that before and for my rental properties, that is awesome because I never have to worry about my tenants doing it.
Shaun was very hard working. He cleaned and repaired our gutters quickly but efficiently. We will be using him for all of our future needs.

It is not often that you find a company that truly impresses you at every step of the process. Tucker's Home Services did just that for my home. Months ago I noticed two large sections of damaged gutters that when it rained, they would sag and water would completely come over the top.
